name: ultraprompt
description: Ultraprompt V8.6 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 55 skills, 31 agents, 46 MCP tools, 32 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, automated evidence-based self-improvement, workflow pathfinding, source-derived routing policy, Invocation Director trigger plans, route replay, live panel proof gates, invocation telemetry gates, reliability-classified release gates, artifact-first agent handoffs, live Mission Control dashboard, fingerprinted gap ledger, and dual-runtime install.
compatibility_notes: V8.6 preserves the native Codex manifest. Installer does not copy the Claude manifest over Codex metadata.
Hooks may require feature detection depending on Codex runtime version.
Subagents supported via Task tool; agent definitions shared with Claude runtime.
Codex native slash commands are not plugin-routed; use $ultraprompt:<skill>, natural language, or MCP tools for plugin operations.
Cognitive memory, dreams, learning, and pathfinding are local-first and governed by release gates.
